hero.tagline: Graduated in Web and Multiplatform Application Development

about.title: About me
about.description: I'm a developer passionate about building web and mobile applications. I graduated in Web and Multiplatform Application Development, and since then I haven't stopped learning and building things that solve real problems.

work-freelance.description: Development of complete web applications for small businesses and individual clients. Implementation of frontends with React and TypeScript, backends with Node.js and deployed in cloud environments.

work-practices-1.description: Professional internship at an IT company. Participation in the development and maintenance of internal web applications, collaboration in agile teams and technical support to users.

work-practices-2.description: Professional internship at an IT company. Participation in the development and maintenance of internal web applications, collaboration in agile teams and technical support to users.

edu-daw.description: Vocational training focused on modern web application development. Acquisition of skills in frontend, backend, databases and server deployment.

edu-dam.description: Advanced training in multi-platform application development. Focus on Kotlin for Android, WPF for desktop and cloud services with AWS.
